voice-orchestrator.description: Start local voice bridge mode with plugin bootstrap auth.
voice-orchestrator.template: Confirm the user wants to enter voice mode, then guide them to run `npm run voice:smoke` and either `npm run voice:bridge -- --text "..."` for fallback text or `VOICE_RECORDER_COMMAND=... VOICE_STT_COMMAND=... npm run voice:listen` for real command-based microphone/STT. Use the plugin bootstrap session for localhost auth; do not ask for VOICE_ORCHESTRATOR_TOKEN and never print token or STT credential values.
